hindi: शिरडी के साईं बाबा, जय जय साईं बाबा। सबका मालिक एक, दया के सागर बाबा॥
english: O Sai Baba of Shirdi, victory to Sai Baba; the one master of all, ocean of compassion
roman: Shirdi Ke Sai Baba, Jai Jai Sai Baba, Sabka Malik Ek Daya Ke Sagar Baba

hindi: हिंदू मुसलमान एक, तेरे दरबार में। भेद न कोई माना, तेरे प्यार में॥
english: Hindu and Muslim are one in your court; no discrimination is made in your love
roman: Hindu Musalman Ek Tere Darbar Mein, Bhed Na Koi Maana Tere Pyar Mein

hindi: चमत्कार किए अनेक, दर्शन से दुख हारे। कोढ़ी को किया निरोग, अंधे को दृष्टि उतारे॥
english: He performed countless miracles, darshan removes all sorrows; cured the leprous, restored sight to the blind
roman: Chamatkar Kiye Anek Darshan Se Dukh Haare, Kodhee Ko Kiya Nirog Andhe Ko Drishti Utaare

hindi: साईं बाबा की आरती, जो कोई भक्त गावे। शिरडी दर्शन से सब कष्ट, दूर होकर जावे॥
english: Whoever sings this aarti of Sai Baba; by taking darshan in Shirdi all troubles go far away
roman: Sai Baba Ki Aarti Jo Koi Bhakt Gaave, Shirdi Darshan Se Sab Kasht Door Hokar Jaave

hindi: शिरडी के साईं बाबा, जय जय साईं बाबा॥
english: O Sai Baba of Shirdi, victory to Sai Baba
roman: Shirdi Ke Sai Baba, Jai Jai Sai Baba
